course.name: Mastering React 16
course.heading: Don't get left behind. React is the way forward to building fast, interactive web apps. This course covers everything.
outcomes: Build and deploy fast and interactive React apps with confidence
Build tables and lists with pagination, sorting and searching
All about Function Components and Hooks
Deploy your React apps to Heroku
Write clean, maintainable code like a pro
Shortcuts to write more code in less time
audience: Anyone wanting to learn front-end development with React
Front-end developers familiar with other libraries and frameworks such as Angular or Vue who want to add React to their toolbox
Back-end developers who want to transition to full-stack development

text: All you need is some basic, beginner-level familiarity with JavaScript.

lessons.name: Side Note: Class vs Function Components
Exercise- Connect Movies Page to the Backend
Exercise- Connect Movie Form to the Backend
Logging in the User upon Registration
Displaying the Current User on NavBar
Showing or Hiding Elements based on the User
Adding Code to a Git Repository
